title: Equipment Proficiencies
excerpt: Details proficiency with weapons and tools, allowing a character to add their Proficiency Bonus to relevant checks.
markdown:
# Equipment Proficiencies
A character gains proficiency with various [[weapons]] and [[tools]] from their class and background. There are two categories of equipment proficiency:

> > **Weapons**Anyone can wield a [[weapons|weapon]], but proficiency makes you better at wielding it. If you have proficiency with a [[weapons|weapon]], you add your [[proficiency_bonus]] to [[attack_roll|attack rolls]] you make with it.
>
> > **Tools**If you have proficiency with a [[tools|tool]], you can add your [[proficiency_bonus]] to any [[ability_check]] you make that uses the [[tools|tool]]. If you have proficiency in the skill that's also used with that check, you have [[advantage]] on the check too. This means you can benefit from both skill proficiency and [[tools|tool]] proficiency on the same [[ability_check]].
